scenarioName: Block clean label with nonzero findings

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Block clean label with nonzero findings
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The Findings section should not show the configured clean findings label. The verdict should not be 'STERILE DOMAIN BODY'. The finding code 'clean-label-with-findings' should be present.
steps.observedResult: The Findings section did not show the configured clean findings label. The verdict was not 'STERILE DOMAIN BODY'. The finding code 'clean-label-with-findings' was present.
